reason_codes: standardized disposition reason code strings sorted alphabetically

condition_keys: array of normalized active condition keys sorted alphabetically
medication_keys: array of normalized active medication keys sorted alphabetically
allergy_keys: array of normalized active allergy keys sorted alphabetically

match_signals: array of normalized match signal codes sorted alphabetically
conflict_signals: array of normalized conflict signal codes sorted alphabetically
conflict_detail_codes: array of normalized conflict detail codes sorted alphabetically

selected_audit_ids: array of relevant audit_id values sorted alphabetically
excluded_audit_ids: array of unrelated audit_id values sorted alphabetically
document_ids: array of document_id values used for packet evidence sorted alphabetically
provider_ids: array of provider_id values used for packet routing/evidence sorted alphabetically

condition_keys: array of normalized inactive or non-merge condition keys sorted alphabetically
medication_keys: array of normalized inactive or non-merge medication keys sorted alphabetically
audit_ids: array of unrelated audit_id values sorted alphabetically

required_review_notes: array of normalized note codes sorted alphabetically
